Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 112 

INHLTN_THRPY_CHRG_AMT 

LABEL: Inhalation Therapy Charge Amount ($) 

DESCRIPTION: The charge amount (rounded to whole dollars) for inhalation therapy services (respiratory and 
pulmonary function) provided during the beneficiary's stay. 

SHORT NAME: INHLTAMT 

LONG NAME: INHLTN_THRPY_CHRG_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by
